label: Job giver patient go to bed
description: Directs an injured pawn to seek a medical bed for rest or treatment.

respectTimetable.label: Respect timetable
respectTimetable.description: If true, the pawn checks whether the timetable allows lying down before seeking a bed.

urgentOnly.label: Urgent only
urgentOnly.description: If true, only triggers when the pawn urgently needs medical rest, not merely when rest is recommended.
